features: Instantly nourishes and supplies dry skin from hands.
The vibrating fragrance reavive the senses
Improves skin quality from dry hands in the long term
dove hand cream 75ml coconut and almond restoring ritual
description: Product Description Dove Nourishing Secrets Restoring Hand Cream 75ml Ingredients Water, Glycerin, Stearic Acid, Caprylic/Caric Triglyceride, Dimethicone, Glycol Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, 1,2-Hexanediol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Carbomer, Cetyl Alcohol, Coconut Nucifera Oil, Cyclopentasylate oxane, decylene Glycoloxane, Disodium EDTA, Glyceryl Stearate, Helianthus Anuus Seed Oil, Isomerized Linoleic Acid, Methylparaben, Perfume, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Penylene Glycol, Petrolatum, Phenoxyethanol, Potassium Sorbate, Propylene Glycol, Propylparaben, Dulcis Amdalus Oil Prunlus Love ydalus extract Prunlus Amydaus Lac Oil Seed, AMP Stearamide, Tocoferyl Acetate, Trideceth-9, Triethanolamine, Coumarin, CI 77891. Directions Squeeze a small amount of Dove Nourishing Secrets Restoring Ritual Hand Cream onto the back of your hand. Smooth into your skin with circular motions for a nourishing boost, and then massage a small amount into each knuckle, and don't forget the spaces between your fingers too. Safety Warning As we are always looking to improve our products, our formulations change from time to time, so please always check the product packaging before use See more
